If it's a 10 minute long video we have some videos that are two hours long so we'll take as many clips from that as we can, and post it over and over again, because there's something in that video that's going to catch their attention right there's one one minute clip that's going to catch their attention, maybe better than the next one, or maybe a quote is going to do better. Um, we don't leave it for too long to create the engagement organically, because we like we said two to 3% of your audience is pretty much all it's going to see your posts organically. So once the post goes up on Facebook or Instagram for example, I'll go ahead and go in and turn it into an ad will let it run for three days or so. And then at that point I'll look at and see at the engagement and the reach of the ad. And then if that posted really really well will decide either to post more of that ambassador to post more of that video to post it again maybe with different calls to action on it linking to another post, etc. So, posting it organically doesn't really give us our data for engagement but turning it into the ad does.
